entity.summary: Built-in automated-market-maker token swap service within the DAOaaS platform on ENI, with current liquidity, fee generation, protocol revenue, and active recent spot-swap volume.
entity.notes: The current first-party swap route is reachable. DefiLlama identifies Dswap as the built-in token swap feature of DAOaaS and reports current ENI TVL, fees, revenue, and substantial non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: DAOaaS Dswap application
evidence.notes: Current first-party swap route remains reachable and provides the exchange-specific application surface within DAOaaS.

evidence.title: Dswap metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies Dswap as the built-in token swap feature of DAOaaS and reports current ENI TVL, fees, revenue, and non-zero recent DEX volume.

evidence.title: Dswap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Dswap as an ENI automated-market-maker exchange surface.
